method: AST census over all 127 modules of src/fanops. Catches: literal attribute assignment, DYNAMIC attribute assignment (var-valued), setattr with a literal field, setattr with a DYNAMIC field name, model_copy(update=<literal dict>), model_copy(update=<variable dict>), constructor state= (literal AND variable), constructor **dict-unpack, generic set_*_state with a non-literal arg, and enum-valued KEYWORD DEFAULTS.
scope_caveat: 'no code writer' is a claim about CODE, not about the field's domain. Every entity is reconstructed from a raw dict at load (Model(**v), ledger.py:444-459), so a hand-edited or externally-written ledger row can carry ANY enum value and it will load and re-persist.

generic_and_dynamic_writers.significance: SOLE writer of PostState.retired; SECOND writer of PostState.analyzed
the Studio twin of cmd_resolve — strictly narrower than the CLI

generic_and_dynamic_writers.bounded_by: _NET_POST_FIELDS = (state, submission_id, error_reason, public_url, media_urls, published_at, account_id) (run.py:120)
generic_and_dynamic_writers.significance: the FINALIZE merge — a DYNAMIC-FIELD state writer that a literal grep cannot see

generic_and_dynamic_writers.bounded_by: upd built at reconcile.py:712 with state=PostState.published
generic_and_dynamic_writers.significance: the reconcile publish promotion — a DYNAMIC-DICT state writer

generic_and_dynamic_writers.bounded_by: _quarantine's call sites pass SourceState.error / MomentState.error / ClipState.error
generic_and_dynamic_writers.significance: a GENERIC per-unit quarantine API — state is a parameter

generic_and_dynamic_writers.bounded_by: KEYWORD DEFAULT clip.py:707 = ClipState.rendered; the ONLY overrides are stitch_render.py:251,333 -> ClipState.stitch_draft
generic_and_dynamic_writers.significance: the Cycle-1 FIND-007 trap class — invisible to a constant grep. This is the ONLY enum-valued keyword default in the entire tree.

generic_and_dynamic_writers.bounded_by: birth = pending if cfg.queue_gate else catalogued (ingest.py:321)

edges.guard: state is queued (run.py:266) + dueness re-checked under lock (run.py:268)
edges.note: CLAIM — persisted BEFORE any network I/O (F11 crash-safety)

edges.guard: state is submitting (run.py:237) + live backend with empty integration id (run.py:229)

edges.note: the NORMAL Postiz path — _postiz_permalink always returns None by design

edges.guard: body MAY have landed; no idempotency key -> never re-POST
state is NOT needs_reconcile (run.py:325, postiz.py:432) — never downgrade an ambiguous park
daemon: no real sid + transient reason + n < _DAEMON_TRANSIENT_MAX(3) (run.py:413-421) | operator: state in (failed,error)
edges.note: the retry counter lives INSIDE error_reason — see COUP-03

edges.guard: track: prior is published (track.py:192) | cli: --url required (cli.py:384)
poller reports published + a VALID public_url (else -> needs_reconcile at reconcile.py:645,689)
st RESTRICTED to published|failed (actions.py:858); already-terminal post refused (actions.py:274)

edges.note: the UNGUARDED force-anything escape hatch — its own docstring at actions.py:258 says so. SOLE writer of PostState.retired.

edges.guard: merges ONLY _NET_POST_FIELDS into a FRESHLY loaded ledger (B4 lost-update fix)

illegal_transitions_and_enforcers.illegal: awaiting_approval -> queued by anything but approve_post
illegal_transitions_and_enforcers.enforcer: every other queued-writer is guarded on failed/error/submitting — none can leave awaiting_approval
FOUR MANUAL call-site guards — NOT the type validator (see invariants.json INV-01)

illegal_transitions_and_enforcers.illegal: double-POST of a post with a real submission id

retired: ledger.py:736 (retire_source — operator only; file LEFT on disk; rebuild will not resurrect)

Source.verified_invariant: rebuild_catalog ADDS orphans only — it NEVER retires a source whose file is missing (ledger.py:746-748)

Moment.unique: the ONLY model with validate_assignment=True (models.py:211) — so setattr IS validated here, unlike every other unit
Moment.verified_invariant: reconcile_moments SKIPS the upsert for a moment whose prior state is retired (ledger.py:636-642) — a later decision cannot un-retire a lineage adjust.retire suppressed
Moment.gc_preservation: a moment whose hook_strategy starts with CLEAN_AWAITING is exempt from cascade delete (ledger.py:630-632)

Clip.no_code_writer_proof: born_state is a keyword default (clip.py:707 = rendered), overridden ONLY to stitch_draft (stitch_render.py:251,333). Every set_clip_state call site passes a literal. model_copy(update={'state': orig.state}) can only copy an existing clip's state.

dead_guard.verdict: ALWAYS FALSE — no writer of published/analyzed exists. Cascade protection rests entirely on _PROTECTED_POST_STATES (ledger.py:667,675), and is sound.

Render.no_code_writer_proof: AST-confirmed: no constructor state= kwarg, no model_copy with a state key, no attribute assignment. Only Render(**v) at ledger.py:458. Cycle-1 FIND-001 CONFIRMED.
Render.note: the renders MAP is written on the publish path; Render.state is not. Cycle-1 Refinement 1 stands.

StitchPlan.note: the only FULLY-driven auxiliary state machine in the system

Batch.note: no writer AND no reader. models.py:488 concedes it: 'born open; this build only ever sets open'.

ImportedMedia.note: NO state field (models.py:508-531). add_imported_media is a true UPSERT (ledger.py:562), deliberately NOT setdefault — a re-pull's fresher metrics must win.

Persona.note: NO state field, no minted id. Identity is the record key in 00_control/personas.json. Not a ledger entity. Resolves UNK-001.

Account.note: NOT a ledger entity — lives in 00_control/accounts.json, mutated under an fcntl flock (accounts.lock), NOT the SQLite lock. Only `active` participates in surfaces() (accounts.py:271).
